welcomeDesc: You've been dropped somewhere on Earth. Look for clues and guess where you are!
classicDesc: Try to guess the exact location
onboardingFact1: These are the Pyramids of Giza in Egypt! They're over 4,500 years old.
onboardingFact2: This is Times Square in New York City! About 50 million people visit every year.
onboardingFact3: This is the Eiffel Tower in Paris, France! It was built in 1889 for the World's Fair.
continentWorldWarning: Continent Guesser works best with World selected
waitingForHostToStart: Waiting for host to start the game
enterUsername: Please enter a username to continue
info1: This is a game about exploring the world through street view!
info2: Explore the location and look for clues
info3: Use the map to guess where you think you are, and see how close you were
info4: Learn geography through play, and have fun!
loginWithGoogle2: to earn XP and track your progress
shortDescMeta: Free Geoguessr alternative with unlimited rounds and fun multiplayer modes. Discover new places and learn geography in this game.
fullDescMeta: Free Geoguessr alternative with unlimited rounds and fun multiplayer modes. Explore the world in this game with unlimited rounds! Learn geography and rise up the leaderboard while exploring the world in WorldGuessr.
subtitle: Imagine being dropped in a random location on Earth. Can you guess where you are?
trackYourProgress1: Link with Google to earn XP and track your progress
addFriendDesc: Add a friend to play together
addFriendDescription: Add a friend to play together
friendReqNotAccepting: This user is not accepting friend requests
alreadyFriends: You are already friends with this user
userAlreadyConnected: You logged in from another device
onboarding2: You are in a random location. Can you figure out where you are?
onboarding3: Place a pin on the map where you think you are. The closer you are, the more points you get.
onboarding4: Use the hint to get a general idea of where you are. Good luck!
onboarding5: Now, lets add a timer to make things more interesting.
onboarding10: The more you play, the more you learn!
onboardingTimeEnd: You forgot to guess within the time. Pay attention!
inviteCooldown: You can invite this user in {{t}} seconds
alreadyInYourGame: User is already in your game
pleaseWaitSeconds: Please wait {{seconds}} seconds to perform this action
lastGuesser: You are the last guesser. Timer reduced to {{s}} seconds
streakLost: Daily login streak lost. Come back tomorrow to grow it!
streakGained: You have a {{streak}} day login streak! Keep it up!
streakStarted: You have a 1 day login streak! Log in daily to grow your streak!
notEnoughLocationsInMap: Not enough locations in this map. There will be repeats.
yourTooFastForUs: You're too fast for us! Please slow down.
watchingAdsSupport: Ads help us run the game and keep it free for everyone. Thank you for your support!
joinDiscordDesc: Join our community and improve your WorldGuessr skills!
maintenanceModeStarted: WorldGuessr is currently in maintenance mode. Some features may be disabled.
maintenanceModeEnded: Maintenance mode has ended. Enjoy a full WorldGuessr experience!
leagueModalDesc: Play duels to gain ELO and climb the leaderboard.
leagueModalDesc2: Stats may be delayed up to 1 hour
unableToJoinDuel: Unable to find duel at this time. Please email support@worldguessr.com
nameChanged: Name changed. It will take up to 24 hours to reflect.
recentChange: You have a recent name change. It can take up to 24 hours for it to fully update.
nameChangeInProgress: Your name change to {{name}} is in progress, it can take up to 24 hours to fully update.
nameChangeCooldown: You can change your name again in {{days}} days
maintenanceText1:
The game will be down for maintenance on {{date}} from {{time}}.
We apologize for the inconvenience.
multiplayerConnectionErrorMessage: This can happen for a variety of reasons. Please check your internet connection, make sure nobody else is using your account and try refreshing the site.
connectingMessage:
Connecting to multiplayer server... (attempt {{currentRetry}}/{{maxRetries}})

If this persists:
• Check your internet connection
• Server may be under maintenance or experiencing issues
startPlayingToSeeHistory: Start playing to see your game history here
gameNoLongerAvailable: This game is no longer available
playGamesToSeeProgression: Play games to see your progression over time
degradedMaps: Disabling Road Labels and NMPZ features are temporarily unavailable. We are working to fix this as soon as possible.
duelWarningText: Using Google or any external help is prohibited and will result in a BAN.
suspensionExplanationTemp: Your account access is temporarily restricted. You cannot participate in multiplayer games until the suspension expires.
suspensionExplanationPerm: Your account has been permanently suspended due to violations of our community guidelines. You cannot participate in multiplayer games.
usernameChangeExplanation: Your username has been flagged as inappropriate. You must change your username before you can continue playing multiplayer games.
goToProfileToChange: Go to your Profile tab to change your username.
eloRefundsDesc: When a cheater is banned, ELO lost against them is automatically refunded.
noEloRefundsYet: No ELO refunds yet. You'll see refunds here if you ever lose ELO to a player who later gets banned for cheating.
noModerationActions: No moderation actions on your account. Keep playing fair!
reportsPrivacyNote: Track the status of your reports. For privacy, specific actions taken are not disclosed.
noReportsSubmitted: You haven't submitted any reports yet. If you encounter cheaters or inappropriate usernames, you can report them after a multiplayer game.
forfeitWarning:
⚠️ You are in a ranked duel!

Leaving now will forfeit the match and you will lose ELO.

Are you sure you want to leave?
banExtensionWarning: Sometimes, third-party browser extensions can interfere with the game and trigger our anti-cheat system.
banExtensionSuggestion: Please try disabling any extensions you have running and see if you are able to access the game.
appealIntro: If you believe this ban was applied incorrectly, you can appeal through our official Discord server:
appealStep4: Create a support ticket following the instructions
appealStep5: A verified player will conduct a live appeal test
appealsNotEmail: Appeals are not handled over email.
appealInstructions: Appeals are handled through our Discord server. Join, verify, and create a ticket in #appeal-game-ban.
opponentLeftBeforeStart: Opponent left before the game started. Returning to queue...
needMorePlayers: Need at least 2 players to start
mapLocationsLoading: Map locations not loaded, try reselecting the map or use a different map
obCompletePrompt: What would you like to try next?
obDescClassicKeepPlaying: Play a full 5-round match across the globe
obDescKeepCountries: Spot more countries and grow your streak!
quipCorrect1: Your geography teacher would be so proud right now.
quipCorrect3: You didn't just Google that, did you?
quipCorrect4: Somewhere, an atlas just shed a tear of joy.
quipCorrect6: Are you a pilot? Because you clearly get around.
quipCorrect7: Your globe at home is blushing.
quipCorrect9: Geography bee champion energy right there.
quipCorrect10: You could navigate without GPS. Probably.
quipCorrect12: National Geographic wants to know your location.
quipCorrect14: You and a world map: a love story.
quipCorrect15: Someone's been paying attention in class.
quipCorrect16: You just made Christopher Columbus look bad.
quipCorrect17: Plot twist: you actually knew that one.
quipCorrect20: One small click for you, one giant flex for geography.
quipCorrect21: You're either really smart or really lucky. Either way, respect.
quipCorrect23: Not even close... to being wrong.
quipCorrect24: The world is your oyster and you just shucked it.
quipWrongSame2: You were in the neighborhood, just knocked on the wrong door.
quipWrongSame6: You can almost see the right answer from there.
quipWrongSame7: Warm! Very warm! But not quite hot.
quipWrongSame8: Your compass was only slightly drunk.
quipWrongSame9: A for effort, C- for accuracy.
quipWrongSame10: You had the right vibe, just the wrong borders.
quipWrongSame11: Like ordering a Pepsi when they wanted Coke. Close enough, but not really.
quipWrongSame12: The right answer was waving at you from next door.
quipWrongSame13: Your GPS had one job and almost did it.
quipWrongSame14: So close, yet so diplomatically incorrect.
quipWrongSame15: At least you got the continent right. Baby steps.
quipWrongSame16: One border too many, my friend.
quipWrongSame17: That answer was in the same time zone at least... maybe.
quipWrongSame18: You picked its neighbor. They do look alike from space.
quipWrongSame20: Almost! The correct answer sends its regards from nearby.
quipWrongDiff2: Your globe just filed for divorce.
quipWrongDiff4: That guess was in a different timezone... and continent.
quipWrongDiff5: The map called. It wants an apology.
quipWrongDiff6: Bold guess. Wrong continent, but bold.
quipWrongDiff7: Somewhere, a geography teacher just flinched.
quipWrongDiff9: Even a blindfolded dart throw might've been closer.
quipWrongDiff10: That wasn't it, but at least you committed.
quipWrongDiff11: Plot twist: it was not, in fact, that.
quipWrongDiff12: Not all who wander are lost. But you might be.
quipWrongDiff13: Your sense of direction said 'trust me bro.'
quipWrongDiff14: The atlas is judging you silently.
quipWrongDiff15: That guess had the spirit, just not the continent.
quipWrongDiff17: The compass is spinning in confusion.
quipWrongDiff18: We're gonna pretend that didn't happen.
quipWrongDiff20: Somewhere, a cartographer just rage quit.
quipWrongDiff22: You didn't just mix up two continents... did you?
quipWrongDiff23: That answer and the right one aren't even in the same ocean.
quipWrongDiff24: An ocean or two off. Give or take.
dailyChallengeSubtitle: 3 locations. 60 seconds each. Same for everyone.
comeBackTomorrow: Come back tomorrow for a new one
streakAtRisk: Streak at risk — play before midnight
notEnoughPlayersYet: Come back later to see how you compare
signInToCompete: Sign in to join the leaderboard
dailyLandingTagline: 3 locations. 60 seconds each. Same challenge for everyone, every day.
dailyLandingStep1: A new challenge unlocks every day at midnight
dailyLandingStep3: Compare your score against everyone else's
dailyLandingNoWinnersYet: Be the first to play today.
dailyLandingLoggedOutPrompt: Sign in to save your streak
confirmStartDaily: Once you start, you only get one attempt. Ready?
dailyDisqualifiedDesc: You switched tabs during the challenge. Keep playing — you'll still see your score and how you compare, but this run can't be added to the leaderboard or your streak.
dailyDisqualifiedRibbon: ⚠️ This run was disqualified — tab switched during the game
alreadyPlayedViewResults: You played today — tap above to view your results
